name: Anita's Italian Herb Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the bread ingredients to room temperature and pour into the bread machine in order.
2. Set "baking control" at 10 o'clock.
3. Select "white bread" and press Start.
4. For best results, use the finest and freshest ingredients available. This is especially true for this particular recipe.
5. Anita, who loves Italian food, recommends purchasing a chunk of imported Parmesan from your nearest Italian market or deli. You'll be disappointed with anything less once you've tried it.
6. Tested in DAK R2D2. Sylvia's comments: Source: Bread Machine Magic by Linda Rehberg & Lois Conway
